title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other models locally with GPU/CPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama server; chat, generate, embed, pull, list models via Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, RAG, and tool use.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Drop-in web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) for chatting with local models; markdown, code highlighting, model manager.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async generate, chat, pull, list, delete models.

title: ollamajs-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models written in Node; repl mode, history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama REST API; generate, chat, embeddings, model control.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator for pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and fluent CLI for Ollama; chat, generate, embeddings, model management.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with GPU support, Open-WebUI, and Postgres for RAG.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selectors and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + llama.cpp for retrieval; Python+FAISS.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers prompts via local Ollama models; slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module wrapping Ollama JS client; injectable services, decorators, and async providers.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-backed process pooling and streaming support.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package for Ollama REST API; chat, generate, pull models, streaming via SSE.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate for Ollama API with Tokio async runtime and streaming iterator.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama REST API; allocator-aware, cross-platform, no external deps.
